title: linum suffruticosum subsp. milletii
intro: Linum suffruticosum subsp. milletii, also known as the Alpine flax or Millet's flax, is a subspecies of the flax plant, which is a flowering plant in the genus Linum. The medicinal properties of Linum suffruticosum subsp. milletii lie in its seeds, which are rich in omega-3 fatty acids and contain anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation and improving heart health, as well as its potential to help manage conditions such as arthritis and other inflammatory diseases. Herbal preparations of Linum suffruticosum subsp. milletii typically involve the seeds being dried and ground into a powder or capsule form, which can be consumed as a dietary supplement.
